test-set.name: xalan_j_tests
test-set.description: Few Xalan-J XSL 3 tests, written in W3C XSLT 3.0 test suite format

result.assert-xml: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><result> <xmlContents> <info id="1"> <a/> <b/> <c/> </info> </xmlContents> <xmlContents> <info id="2"> <p/> <q/> <r/> </info> </xmlContents> <xmlContents> <info id="3"> <m/> <n/> <o/> </info> </xmlContents> <xmlContents> <info> <a1>8</a1> <b1>9</b1> <c1>10</c1> <d1>11</d1> <e1>12</e1> <f1>13</f1> <g1>14</g1> </info> </xmlContents> <txtContents>hello world. this is used to test xpath fn:collection function.</txtContents> <map> <entry key="a">1</entry> <entry key="b">2</entry> <entry key="c">3</entry> <entry key="d">4</entry> <entry key="e">5</entry> </map> <array> <item>a1</item> <item>b1</item> <item>c1</item> <item>d1</item> <item>10</item> </array> <map> <entry key="info"> </entry> </map> </result>
